# `dndR`: Dungeons & Dragons Functions for Players and Dungeon Masters

![](reference/figures/dndR_hex.png)

The goal of `dndR` is to provide a suite of Dungeons & Dragons (Fifth
Edition a.k.a. “5e”) related functions to help both players and Dungeon
Masters (DMs). Check out the package website
([njlyon0.github.io/dndR](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/)) for
documentation of the functions currently included in the package. I am
always willing to expand that list though so if you have a D&D-related
task that could be cool as a function, please [review the contributing
guidelines](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/CONTRIBUTING.html) on how to
share your idea!

## Installation

You can install the development version of `dndR` from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("njlyon0/dndR")
```

## Contributing to `dndR`

If you’d like to contribute function scripts or ideas, that is more than
welcome! Please check out the [contributing
guidelines](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/CONTRIBUTING.html) and follow
the instructions described there.

### Package Contributors

- [Tim Schatto-Eckrodt](https://kudusch.de/) contributed the
  `party_diagram` function
- [Humberto Nappo](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7810-1635) contributed
  the idea for the `pc_level_calc` function
- [Billy Mitchell](https://wj-mitchell.github.io/) contributed the
  vectors of names used to expand the `npc_creator` function

# Package index

## All functions

- [`ability_scores()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/ability_scores.md)
  : Roll for All Ability Scores
- [`ability_singular()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/ability_singular.md)
  : Rolls for a Single Ability Score
- [`class_block()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/class_block.md)
  : Assign Ability Scores Based on Class
- [`coin()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/coin.md) : Flip a
  Coin
- [`cr_convert()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/cr_convert.md)
  : Convert Challenge Rating to Experience Points
- [`creature_list()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/creature_list.md)
  : List Creatures Based on Criteria
- [`creature_text()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/creature_text.md)
  : Retrieve Full Creature Description Text by Creature Name
- [`creatures`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/creatures.md) :
  Dungeons and Dragons Creature Information
- [`d10()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/d10.md) : Roll a
  Ten-Sided Dice ("d10")
- [`d100()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/d100.md) : Roll a
  One Hundred-Sided Dice ("d100")
- [`d12()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/d12.md) : Roll a
  Twelve-Sided Dice ("d12")
- [`d2()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/d2.md) : Roll a
  Two-Sided Dice
- [`d20()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/d20.md) : Roll a
  Twenty-Sided Dice ("d20")
- [`d3()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/d3.md) : Roll a
  Three-Sided Dice
- [`d4()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/d4.md) : Roll a
  Four-Sided Dice ("d4")
- [`d6()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/d6.md) : Roll a
  Six-Sided Dice ("d6")
- [`d8()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/d8.md) : Roll an
  Eight-Sided Dice ("d8")
- [`dnd_classes()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/dnd_classes.md)
  : Return Vector of Accepted Classes
- [`dnd_damage_types()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/dnd_damage_types.md)
  : Return Vector of Supported DnD Damage Types
- [`dnd_races()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/dnd_races.md)
  : Return Vector of Supported DnD Races
- [`encounter_creator()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/encounter_creator.md)
  : Balance a Combat Encounter for Given Party Composition and
  Difficulty
- [`first_names_fem()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/first_names_fem.md)
  : Return Vector of Feminine First Names
- [`first_names_masc()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/first_names_masc.md)
  : Return Vector of Masculine First Names
- [`mod_calc()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/mod_calc.md) :
  Calculate Modifier for Specified Ability Score
- [`monster_creator()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/monster_creator.md)
  : Creates a Monster for Given Party Level and Size
- [`monster_stats()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/monster_stats.md)
  : Quickly Identify Monster Statistics
- [`monster_table`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/monster_table.md)
  : Dungeons and Dragons Quick Table for Creature Statistics
- [`npc_creator()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/npc_creator.md)
  : Create a Non-Player Character (NPC)
- [`party_diagram()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/party_diagram.md)
  : Generate a Diagram of a Party's Ability Scores
- [`pc_creator()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/pc_creator.md)
  : Create a Player Character (PC)
- [`pc_level_calc()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/pc_level_calc.md)
  : Calculate Player Character (PC) Level from Current Experience Points
  (XP)
- [`probability_plot()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/probability_plot.md)
  : Generate a Plot of the Frequency of Roll Outcomes
- [`race_mods()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/race_mods.md)
  : Identify Race-Based Ability Modifiers
- [`reroll()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/reroll.md) :
  Re-Roll 1s from a Prior Dice Roll
- [`roll()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/roll.md) : Roll
  Any Number of Dice
- [`spell_list()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/spell_list.md)
  : List Spells Based on Criteria
- [`spell_text()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/spell_text.md)
  : Retrieve Full Spell Description Text by Spell Name
- [`spells`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/spells.md) :
  Dungeons and Dragons Spell Information
- [`surnames()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/surnames.md) :
  Return Vector of Surnames
- [`xp_cost()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/xp_cost.md) :
  Adjust the XP Total by Number of Monsters and Party Size
- [`xp_pool()`](https://njlyon0.github.io/dndR/reference/xp_pool.md) :
  Calculate Total XP of Monsters for Given Party Level and Difficulty
